user.title: Mertik Maxitrol Fireplace
user.description: Enter the IP address of your myfire WiFi box and thermostatic control thresholds.

data.name: Fireplace name
data.host: IP address of the WiFi box
data.low_threshold: Low heat threshold (degrees C below setpoint)
data.high_threshold: Full heat threshold (degrees C below setpoint, must be greater than Low)

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Mertik Maxitrol
reconfigure.description: Update the IP address or name of your fireplace.

data.name: Fireplace name
data.host: IP address of the WiFi box
data.low_threshold: Low heat threshold (degrees C below setpoint)
data.high_threshold: Full heat threshold (degrees C below setpoint, must be greater than Low)

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the fireplace WiFi box. Check the IP address and that the device is powered on and connected to your network.
error.invalid_thresholds: Thresholds must be positive numbers, and the Low threshold must be less than the Full threshold.

cannot_connect.title: Cannot connect to Mertik Maxitrol fireplace
cannot_connect.description: Home Assistant cannot reach the fireplace WiFi box at {host}. Check that the device is powered on and connected to your network. If the IP address has changed, use **Reconfigure** to update it.

cannot_connect.message: Unable to connect to the fireplace. Check the IP address and that the device is powered on and connected to your network.

state.f03: F03 – Thermocouple wiring or ON/OFF switch fault
state.f04: F04 – Ignition sequence malfunction (wait 1 min, retry)
state.f10: F10 – Main burner ignition failure (2nd thermocouple)
state.f44: F44 – Handset not in range or low battery

init.title: Fireplace Options
init.description: Choose the temperature sensor used for thermostatic control and adjust the heating thresholds.

data.temperature_sensor: Temperature sensor (leave blank to use the fireplace handset)
data.low_threshold: Low heat threshold (degrees C below setpoint)
data.high_threshold: Full heat threshold (degrees C below setpoint, must be greater than Low)

error.invalid_thresholds: Thresholds must be positive numbers, and the Low threshold must be less than the Full threshold.
error.invalid_temp_step: Setpoint step must be a positive number.
